name: MaixPremium - Open Position Alert - v3 Test

nodes.name: MSSQL: Get Open ing Signals & Position

parameters.jsCode:
var trade = $node["Webhook"].json["body"]["trade"];

var getOpenPositionQuery = 
`
DECLARE @WindowTime INT;
DECLARE @MinScore FLOAT;

SELECT @WindowTime = WindowTime,
       @MinScore = MinScore
FROM TradeSignalSetting
WHERE Id = 3; -- Luxury

WITH FilteredSignals AS
  (SELECT TOP 100 [Id],
          [TraderName],
          [Direction],
          [TradingPair],
          [Leverage],
          [EntryPrice],
          [ClosingPrice],
          [PositionSize],
          [AverageCost],
          [PNL],
          [PNLPercentage],
          [OpenedDate],
          [ClosedDate],
          [CreatedDate],
          [TradeDurationInSecond],
          [PositionMode],
          [Status],
          [TraderScore],
          'Signal' AS SIGNAL,
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TraderName,
                                          TradingPair,
                                          Direction
                             ORDER BY OpenedDate DESC) AS RowNum
   FROM [dbo].[FutureSignal]
   WHERE OpenedDate >= DATEADD(MINUTE, -(@WindowTime), GETUTCDATE())
     AND Direction = '${trade["actionDirection"]}'
     AND TradingPair = '${trade["tradingPair"]}'
     AND Status = 0
   ORDER BY OpenedDate DESC),


DistinctSignals AS
  (SELECT TOP 100 *
   FROM FilteredSignals
   WHERE RowNum = 1
   ORDER BY OpenedDate DESC)

   
SELECT TOP 1 *
FROM DistinctSignals
WHERE
    (SELECT SUM(TraderScore)
     FROM DistinctSignals) >= @MinScore
ORDER BY TraderScore DESC;


SELECT *,
       'Position' AS POSITION
FROM TradeSignalLuxury
WHERE TradingPair = '${trade["tradingPair"]}'
  AND Status = 0
`

return {
  query: getOpenPositionQuery
}

nodes.name: QUERY: Get Open ing Signals & Position

parameters.query:
DECLARE @WindowTime INT;
DECLARE @MinScore FLOAT;

SELECT @WindowTime = WindowTime * 100,
       @MinScore = MinScore
FROM TradeSignalSetting
WHERE Id = 3; -- Luxury

WITH FilteredSignals AS
  (SELECT TOP 100 [Id],
          [TraderName],
          [Direction],
          [TradingPair],
          [Leverage],
          [EntryPrice],
          [ClosingPrice],
          [PositionSize],
          [AverageCost],
          [PNL],
          [PNLPercentage],
          [OpenedDate],
          [ClosedDate],
          [CreatedDate],
          [TradeDurationInSecond],
          [PositionMode],
          [Status],
          [TraderScore],
          'Signal' AS SIGNAL,
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TraderName,
                                          TradingPair,
                                          Direction
                             ORDER BY OpenedDate DESC) AS RowNum
   FROM [dbo].[FutureSignal]
   WHERE OpenedDate >= DATEADD(MINUTE, -(@WindowTime), GETUTCDATE())
     AND Direction = 'LONG'
     AND TradingPair = 'ETHUSDT'
     AND Status = 0
   ORDER BY OpenedDate DESC),


DistinctSignals AS
  (SELECT TOP 100 *
   FROM FilteredSignals
   WHERE RowNum = 1
   ORDER BY OpenedDate DESC)

   
SELECT *
FROM DistinctSignals
WHERE
    (SELECT SUM(TraderScore)
     FROM DistinctSignals) >= @MinScore
ORDER BY TraderScore DESC;


SELECT *,
       'Position' AS POSITION
FROM TradeSignalLuxury
WHERE TradingPair = 'ETHUSDT'
  AND Status = 0
